issues: detail_density_gap: gems are significantly simpler than the multi-component, rivet/strap-detailed Denzi helmet peers
outline_weight_mismatch: peer helmets show thick uniform black outlines; gem sprites appear to use thinner or color-blended outlines at this scale

highlight_treatment_differs: peers use controlled, restrained specular patches; gems rely on bright facet-flash highlights characteristic of a lighter icon style rather than Denzi heavyweight rendering
no_visible_dithering_or_multi_step_shading: Denzi style shows 3-5 shading steps per surface; gems appear to use ~2-3 flat facet tones, losing the painterly depth
scale_and_mass_disparity: each peer helmet is a large, visually weighty sprite; the ruby fragments are small and visually lightweight, creating a perceived quality gap in the same item category
reasoning: Peer set is Denzi-style pixel-art helmets: thick black outlines, multi-step tonal shading, high detail density, controlled highlights, dark-background presentation. Candidate gem_ruby_v00 shares the dark background and general pixel-art DNA but diverges on four critical style axes. (1) Detail density: helmets are packed with rivets, straps, face guards and layered metallic surfaces; the ruby sprites are simple faceted shapes with minimal interior detail — a clear Denzi under-build. (2) Highlight intensity: gem facets display bright, saturated flash highlights inconsistent with the muted, controlled specular treatment on peer metals. (3) Shading steps: the Denzi style demands ≥3 graduated tones per major surface; the gems appear to use flat facet fills with a single bright highlight, losing the characteristic volume. (4) Outline character: peer outlines are heavy and uniform; gem outlines look thinner and possibly hue-shifted to pink — a departure. Color temperature difference (warm magenta vs cool silver/gold) is expected for a gem vs armor item and is NOT penalised. CHARM LEVEL is passable — the gems could fit a casual cute aesthetic, but the Denzi peer family leans serious/detailed, so the simplified gem look feels underpowered. Overall the sprite is recognisable as pixel art in the same universe but lacks the craftsmanship level the peer set establishes.
